attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.COST_BUD_ID_SEQ, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.SKU_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.DLVRBLE_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.GPL_CODE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.GPL_CURR_CODE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.NUM_OF_HRS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.HOURLY_RATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.JOB_ROLE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.NUM_OF_TRIPS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.TRIP_COST, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.NUM_OF_NIGHT_AWAY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.NIGHT_COST, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.NUM_OF_TRAVEL_HRS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.TRAVEL_COST, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.PCOGS_COST, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.HARDWARE_COST, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.LAB_FEE_COST, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.RATE_BAND, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP,
 (
select COST_BUD_ID_SEQ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP
minus
select COST_BUD_ID_SEQ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP
) ACM
where 
 ACM.COST_BUD_ID_SEQ = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.COST_BUD_ID_SEQ and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_LW_CST_BUD_SKU_MP.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_CST_BD_SKU_MP)
